name: consumedMethodRef::CallAsync
title: consumedMethodRef::CallAsync
description: Calls the method from the specified consumer at the specified provider. The function call is made asynchronously, i.e. the call does not wait for the function to be called and the return to be received. In test procedures, you can wait for the answer with TestWaitForAnswer; in simulation programs, you can use the handler on fct_Returned. In form 2, the callback function is called when the return is received.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
